founder_input.product_description: Demeo helps technical B2B founders turn their product into a guided buyer demo. A prospect receives a link to an AI-led experience that explains the product, answers questions, qualifies the opportunity, and prepares follow-up for the founder.
founder_input.target_customer: technical B2B startup founders selling software
founder_input.prospect_description: a founder evaluating whether Demeo can demo their own startup
demo_goals: show what a founder provides during setup
show how content or agent output is generated
show the founder what they receive after a prospect finishes the demo
founder_input.founder_walkthrough: Start by showing how the founder enters company and product context. Then show the agent/content console where AI output can be generated from that context. Then show the prospect demo room where a buyer can ask questions. Finally show the CRM summary and follow-up output that qualifies the lead. Emphasize that the final product sends a prospect a personalized link and the AI demo agent guides them.

approved_qa.question: What does the founder need to provide?
approved_qa.answer: A product or staging URL, sandbox credentials when needed, target persona, demo goals, a short walkthrough, approved Q&A, CTA, and qualification questions.

approved_qa.question: Should the runtime click the real app directly?
approved_qa.answer: The MVP should use an approved manifest and visual event playback. Playwright is better for setup-time extraction and validation. Live app control can come later for approved low-risk paths.

approved_qa.question: Can this support voice?
approved_qa.answer: Yes. Gemini Live or a LiveKit voice agent can call the same safe demo tools used by text: show page, move cursor, highlight, propose click, answer from knowledge, and update lead memory.

qualification_questions: What product do you want Demeo to demo?
Do you have a safe sandbox or staging account?

crawl_pages.title: About - Demeo
crawl_pages.visible_text:
Demeo
№ 001 · OPERATOR
HOME
SETUP
AGENTS
DASHBOARD
ABOUT
LAUNCH APP
→
VOL. I - ISSUE 02
THE PEOPLE BEHIND THE OPERATOR
EST. ZBS
ABOUT № 01
Built by people who believed
the back office should run itself.

Founders keep avoiding the same things - legal, content, research. Not because they don't matter. Because they're slow, painful, and not why you started building. DEMEO exists to take that off your plate for good.

§ I - FOUNDERS
Three builders. One platform.
DK
CO-FOUNDER
Daria Konstantinova

Daria decides what DEMEO feels like. She turns complex agent output into product decisions founders can actually use - and makes sure nothing ships that doesn't earn its place.

GL
CO-FOUNDER
Grigorii Lukianov

Grigorii built the system that makes DEMEO run. Agent orchestration, context pipelines, production infrastructure - if it powers the office, he designed it.

DI
CO-FOUNDER
Din Iskakov

Din takes DEMEO to market. He knows how early-stage companies stall - and built the commercial engine to make sure DEMEO doesn't let that happen to founders.

§ II - MISSION
Founders should build. Not manage chaos.

The best founders we know aren't blocked by ambition - they're blocked by the operational weight no one warned them about. We built DEMEO to clear that weight, so the only thing left is the work that actually matters.

© ZBS - DEMEO
AI AGENTS FOR FOUNDERS
END - ISSUE 02

GENERATED FOLLOW-UP EMAIL

To: karri@linear.app
Subject: Quick recap + the technical deep-dive you asked about

Hi Karri,

Loved the demo room session - especially your point on keeping AE bandwidth on strategic accounts only. Based on what we covered:

Sending the SOC2 + DPA pack (Legal Agent already prepped it).
Booking 30 min with Tuomas to cover the HubSpot two-way sync.
Pricing proposal at Growth tier ready when you are.

If Tuesday 10:00 ET works, I'll drop a calendar invite. Otherwise just reply with a better window.

- Demeo
on behalf of your team

approved_answers.answer: Demeo is an AI-powered GTM operations platform for founders.
It helps with content, legal checks, research, and a live demo room in one AI office.
Content Agent, Legal Agent, Research Agent, and Demo Agent.
It collects company context so agents can produce tailored, specific output.
A private demo experience that is built specifically for a prospect and can lead to a CRM summary.

notes: Some controls appear visually like buttons but have no confirmed backend effect; only obviously safe navigation/highlight actions were approved.
The legal page shows a failed overview load; no retry flow beyond the visible Try again button was assumed.

decisions.question: What does the founder need to provide?
decisions.reply: The founder provides company and product context so Demeo can tailor the demo.

events.say: Here’s the setup form where the founder enters company context.

approved_answers.topic: What does the founder need to provide?
approved_answers.answer: A product or staging URL, sandbox credentials when needed, target persona, demo goals, a short walkthrough, approved Q&A, CTA, and qualification questions.

approved_answers.topic: Should the runtime click the real app directly?
approved_answers.answer: The MVP should use an approved manifest and visual event playback. Playwright is better for setup-time extraction and validation. Live app control can come later for approved low-risk paths.
Yes. Gemini Live or a LiveKit voice agent can call the same safe demo tools used by text: show page, move cursor, highlight, propose click, answer from knowledge, and update lead memory.

notes: Selector hints come only from crawled controls when available.
The /crm route is discovered via internal link and treated as part of the safe walkthrough.
Some buttons appear to be UI tabs or presets; they are not added as click actions unless their effect is clearly safe.

A product or staging URL, sandbox credentials when needed, target persona, demo goals, a short walkthrough, approved Q&A, CTA, and qualification questions.

pages.purpose: Founder enters company and product context for demo setup.

important_elements.label: Product / company context form
important_elements.selector_hint: form fields for product name, product description, target customer, and prospect type
important_elements.why: Needed for onboarding and demo personalization.

important_elements.label: Qualification questions
important_elements.selector_hint: section or list for buyer qualification questions
important_elements.why: Shows what the founder provides to qualify leads.

important_elements.label: CTA / next step
important_elements.selector_hint: button or field labeled CTA, next step, or call to action

allowed_actions.label: Highlight setup inputs
allowed_actions.intent: Show the founder-provided context used to generate the demo.

pages.purpose: AI content and agent output generation from founder context.

important_elements.label: Generate content / agent output
important_elements.selector_hint: button or panel labeled generate, create, or run
important_elements.why: Demonstrates how the AI output is produced.

important_elements.label: Knowledge or walkthrough source
important_elements.selector_hint: editor, sidebar, or tab for walkthrough, approved Q&A, and knowledge base
important_elements.why: Shows the source material used by the demo agent.

important_elements.label: Preview output
important_elements.selector_hint: preview pane for generated copy or agent behavior
important_elements.why: Lets the founder inspect generated content safely.

pages.purpose: Buyer-facing demo room where the prospect asks questions and receives a guided demo.

important_elements.label: Chat / question input
important_elements.selector_hint: text input, chat box, or ask a question area
important_elements.why: Core interaction for the AI-led demo experience.

important_elements.label: AI response area
important_elements.why: Shows the agent answering questions from knowledge.

important_elements.label: Highlight / show page tool
important_elements.selector_hint: control for highlight, show, or guide the user
important_elements.why: Supports safe visual guidance during the demo.

allowed_actions.label: Highlight question input
allowed_actions.intent: Show where the prospect interacts with the demo agent.

allowed_actions.label: Explain how the demo room works
allowed_actions.intent: Describe that the buyer gets a personalized link and can ask questions in the AI-led experience.

pages.purpose: Founder sees CRM summary, qualification, and follow-up after the prospect finishes.

important_elements.label: Lead qualification summary
important_elements.selector_hint: summary card or section for buyer fit, intent, and qualification
important_elements.why: Shows the post-demo outcome for the founder.

important_elements.label: Follow-up output
important_elements.selector_hint: notes, email draft, or follow-up recommendation panel
important_elements.why: Shows what the founder receives after the demo.

important_elements.label: CRM record or export
important_elements.selector_hint: CRM sync, export, or lead memory section
important_elements.why: Represents the handoff into founder workflow.

flows.goal: Show the full founder journey from setup to prospect demo to follow-up.

steps.say: Here the founder provides product context, walkthrough, approved Q&A, and qualification details.
This is where AI output is generated from the founder's inputs.
The prospect gets a personalized demo link and can ask questions in the demo room.
After the demo, the founder receives qualification and follow-up output.

approved_answers.answer: A product or staging URL, sandbox credentials when needed, target persona, demo goals, a short walkthrough, approved Q&A, CTA, and qualification questions.
The MVP should use an approved manifest and visual event playback. Playwright is better for setup-time extraction and validation. Live app control can come later for approved low-risk paths.
Yes. Gemini Live or a LiveKit voice agent can call the same safe demo tools used by text: show page, move cursor, highlight, propose click, answer from knowledge, and update lead memory.

notes: No crawled pages were provided, so routes and selector hints are generic and intentionally non-specific.
Clicks were avoided because only obviously safe actions should be allowed without page crawl evidence.

important_elements.label: Agent control panel
important_elements.why: Visible specialist area for demo framing.

allowed_actions.label: Highlight value proposition
allowed_actions.intent: Point out the specialist agents area.

pages.purpose: Company setup form for founder context used by all agents.

important_elements.label: One-liner description
important_elements.selector_hint: textarea[placeholder="We help B2B SaaS teams turn cold outreach into qualified pipeline with AI demo rooms."]

important_elements.label: Target audience
important_elements.selector_hint: input[placeholder="Solo founders, lean B2B sales teams, Series A startups"]

important_elements.label: Product/service description
important_elements.selector_hint: textarea[placeholder="Describe what your product does, its core value proposition, and how it works..."]

important_elements.label: Save & Start Creating Content
important_elements.why: Primary completion CTA, currently disabled in crawl.

allowed_actions.label: Highlight company setup form
allowed_actions.intent: Show what the founder provides during setup.

allowed_actions.label: Agents
allowed_actions.intent: Move to agent lab after setup context.

pages.purpose: Agent lab listing the specialist pages, including the demo room.
Command center summarizing setup status and quick links to core pages.
Founder story and mission page.
Content generation agent page with workflows and prompt entry.

important_elements.label: Prompt box
important_elements.why: Where the founder asks for content.

pages.purpose: Legal agent page showing legal guidance tabs and retry state.
Research agent page for competitor and market workflows.

allowed_actions.label: Highlight research input
allowed_actions.intent: Show where research questions are entered.

pages.purpose: Prospect-facing demo room where the AI answers buyer questions and can end into CRM summary.

important_elements.why: Safe destination to show post-demo output.

important_elements.label: How is this different from Outreach.io?
important_elements.selector_hint: button:has-text("How is this different from Outreach.io?")

allowed_actions.label: Highlight buyer question buttons
allowed_actions.intent: Show the demo room interaction model.

pages.purpose: CRM summary and follow-up output after the demo finishes.

important_elements.label: Send now
important_elements.why: Final send action shown on page.

allowed_actions.intent: Review the follow-up email before sending.

flows.goal: Show founder setup, then agent output, then the prospect demo room.

steps.say: First, the founder provides company context here.
That context powers the operator room and specialist agents.
From the agent lab, we open the prospect-facing demo room.
Buyers can ask questions or use the suggested prompts.

flows.goal: Show how content is generated from the workspace.

steps.say: Here the founder asks for a specific piece of content.
Then the system generates output from that request.

flows.goal: Show what the founder receives after a prospect finishes the demo.

steps.say: When the demo ends, we move into the CRM summary.
This shows lead score, objections handled, and follow-up draft.

approved_answers.topic: What does the founder need to provide?
approved_answers.answer: A product or staging URL, sandbox credentials when needed, target persona, demo goals, a short walkthrough, approved Q&A, CTA, and qualification questions.

approved_answers.topic: Should the runtime click the real app directly?
approved_answers.answer: The MVP should use an approved manifest and visual event playback. Playwright is better for setup-time extraction and validation. Live app control can come later for approved low-risk paths.
Yes. Gemini Live or a LiveKit voice agent can call the same safe demo tools used by text: show page, move cursor, highlight, propose click, answer from knowledge, and update lead memory.

Demeo helps technical B2B founders turn their product into a guided buyer demo. A prospect receives a link to an AI-led experience that explains the product, answers questions, qualifies the opportunity, and prepares follow-up for the founder.
Technical B2B startup founders selling software.
What product do you want Demeo to demo? Do you have a safe sandbox or staging account? Who is the target buyer?

notes: Use only discovered routes and selector hints.
Some visible controls are disabled in crawl; do not assume they can be clicked until enabled.
CRM route exists as an internal link from the demo room.
